title: 10 Signs You Actually Have a Brotherhood
caption:
Most men have a group chat. Not many have a brotherhood.

The difference isn't the frequency of the texts. It's whether anyone in that group knows your actual sin — not your "struggles." Whether they'd answer at 2 a.m. Whether they've ever challenged a decision you made.

Real brotherhood deepens. Everything else plateaus.

If you don't have it, this is what you're looking for. And if you're not sure — ask yourself when the last time was that someone prayed for you by name.

Tag the brother who shows up. He needs to hear it.

#faith #brotherhood #christianmen #godlymen #accountability #scripture #james516 #manofgod #discipleship
